name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14092 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series key pouch is made of monogram coated canvas and features playful rainbow tones, inspired by the passionate and lively aesthetics of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The key pouch has clean lines and can easily fit into a handbag or pocket. It has an internal hook to hold six keys and is securely fastened with a gold snap button. 12 x 7 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
